how_to_approve_a_testimonial: When someone submits from your site, you get an email via Formspree.
To approve: add an entry to the 'testimonials' array below and set 'approved' to true, then push.
To reject: simply don't add it.
role     → job title and company (e.g. 'Senior Engineer · CARS24')
text     → their message — do NOT include quotes, they are added automatically
approved → true to show on site, false to hide
